summary: Added time-based evolution module that smoothly drifts paletteHue, cadence, and paletteSaturation over elapsed session time using seeded layered sine waves. Each session produces unique modulation curves via PRNG. Integration into renderLoop tracks elapsed time from first frame, applies evolution when seed is available, and passes elapsed in FrameState. Non-evolved params (density, motionAmplitude, pointerDisturbance, bassEnergy, trebleEnergy) pass through unchanged. All 259 tests pass, build succeeds.
